changelog: Phase 13C cleanup. 13C.1: удалены audit-screens/ + PROJECT_AUDIT_*.md + .playwright-cli/.playwright-mcp/playwright-report/test-results/ из git и working dir; .gitignore обновлён. 13C.2: docs/archive/2026/ создан с README-конвенцией о том, когда переезжать execution-guides в архив. 13C.3: scripts/dev-db-reset.php — CLI с --really-truncate-test-data флагом, dry-run по умолчанию; truncate-list = orders/reservations/group_orders/loyalty_transactions/marketing_sends/webhook_deliveries/stock_movements/shifts/time_entries/tip_splits/shift_swap_requests/idempotency_keys (17 таблиц). Не трогает menu_items/users/settings/kitchen_stations/ingredients/locations/loyalty_tiers/promo_codes (showcase data).
